productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Grey Casual Sandals
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, this casual flip flop from red tape makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. Wear it all by itself on a warm day, or pair it with warm toe socks on a chilly day and revel in the comfort of luxurious leather.UpperSoft and smooth leather midfoot straps for durability and comfortCaudroy fabric detailing on the midfoot and a toe separator to lock the foot in placePadded fabric inner lining for the straps for abrasion-free comfortOutsoleTPU out-sole with strategically placed terraced lugs and grooved lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for easy movementSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
